ideas.title: Router economics panel: spark-vs-cloud token split as a live cost/economics view
ideas.why: World signal 'Skepticism about the AI infrastructure boom' + ontology 'AI compute circular financing', 'Memory-bandwidth-bound decode', 'KV Cache' and 'Prefill/Decode Disaggregation' make the router's real spark/cloud split (21 spark today, 1666 cloud_hard) a genuinely on-topic, shareable data story rather than a decorative widget.

ideas.title: Pre-author compile gate: daemon must pass `cargo check --locked` before it commits
ideas.why: The needs-review revert incident (bfada18 — a 20-commit non-compiling email-gate the daemon shipped and self-heal had to unwind) is the direct signal; grounded in ontology 'Deterministic verification of generated code', 'Shift-left security' and 'Reproducible builds (lockfile pinning)' this moves verification from post-hoc revert to author-time rejection — the doctrine's #1 harness layer.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for instant search across posts, /kb concepts, and factory vitals
ideas.why: The DESTINATION lens and Linear/Vercel's palette pattern show fast content discovery is what makes a site bookmarkable; grounded in ontology 'Minimal Agent Scaffolding' and 'Context ontology' it turns the 153-URL site (KB + posts) into something navigable by keyboard rather than scrolling — explicitly a palette, not a shell.

ideas.title: Live 'factory heartbeat' visualization: streaming loop telemetry as an animated pulse
ideas.why: The router signal (spark 85 vs cloud_hard 1666, 383 commits/7d) plus ontology 'Observability', 'Scheduled autonomy' and 'Self-healing' argue for a real-time animated pulse of commits/CI/watchdog health so a visitor SEES the autonomous loop breathing — the observability doctrine layer made visible.

ideas.title: 3D replayable agent-session timeline mapped onto the WebGL brain + knowledge graph
ideas.why: World signal 'Visual replay of coding-agent work' + the grounded Mindwalk opportunity demand a way to spatially replay each session, expressing the ontology concepts 'Agent Session Replay', 'Time-travel debugging', 'Software cartography' and 'Agent execution tracing' — showing which concept-nodes a run touched and what it shipped, step by step.

ideas.title: Reading-time estimate + hover section-anchor permalinks on post pages
ideas.why: The DESTINATION reading-UX lens (borrowing Medium's reading-time and anchored headings) closes a real gap in share/permalink quality on posts; a single meaningful reading-experience fix grounded in 'Algorithm-aware content formatting', kept to one micro-item this run per the anti-widget rule.
